title: ennemiesBase
description: Schema of data structure for the enemies in battleScissor

Xp.description: Experience points granted by the enemy

HitPoint.description: The total Hit Points of the enemy

Mana.description: The total Mana of the enemy

DefenseRange.description: The Range Defense value of the enemy

DefenseMelee.description: The Melee Defense value of the enemy

ResPhysical.description: The total Physical Resistance of the enemy

ResChi.description: The total Chi Resistance of the enemy

ResFire.description: The total Chi Resistance of the enemy

ResLightning.description: The total Lightning Resistance of the enemy

ResIce.description: The total Ice Resistance of the enemy

ResMental.description: The total Mental Resistance of the enemy

Skill1Name.description: Name of the first skill of the enemy

Skill1Cost.description: Mana cost of the first skill of the enemy

Skill1Element.description: Element type of the first skill of the enemy

Skill1Type.description: Type of the first skill of the enemy

Skill1TouchChance.description: Chance to hit with the first skill of the enemy

Skill1MinDamage.description: Minimum damage of the first skill of the enemy

Skill1MaxDamage.description: Maximum damage of the first skill of the enemy

Skill1OtherEffect.description: Other effect of the first skill of the enemy

Skill2Name.description: Name of the second skill of the enemy

Skill2Cost.description: Mana cost of the second skill of the enemy

Skill2Element.description: Element type of the second skill of the enemy

Skill2Type.description: Type of the second skill of the enemy

Skill2TouchChance.description: Chance to hit with the second skill of the enemy

Skill2MinDamage.description: Minimum damage of the second skill of the enemy

Skill2MaxDamage.description: Maximum damage of the second skill of the enemy

Skill2OtherEffect.description: Other effect of the second skill of the enemy

Skill3Name.description: Name of the third skill of the enemy

Skill3Cost.description: Mana cost of the third skill of the enemy

Skill3Element.description: Element type of the third skill of the enemy

Skill3Type.description: Type of the third skill of the enemy

Skill3TouchChance.description: Chance to hit with the third skill of the enemy

Skill3MinDamage.description: Minimum damage of the third skill of the enemy

Skill3MaxDamage.description: Maximum damage of the third skill of the enemy

Skill3OtherEffect.description: Other effect of the third skill of the enemy

LootType.description: Type of loot dropped by the enemy

LootTypeName.description: Name of the loot type dropped by the enemy

LootValue.description: Value of the loot dropped by the enemy
